creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:

lang/gjs                        (31 skipped)
sysutils/slurm-wlm              (23 skipped)
devel/glslang                   (22 skipped)
devel/dee                       (14 skipped)
www/chromium                    (10 skipped)
